html.title: Pack 1: Attentiveness — Caring About — Civic AI
html.description: Attentiveness in Civic AI: noticing what the people closest to a problem see that institutions miss. Pack 1 of the 6-Pack of Care by Audrey Tang and Caroline Green.

html.title: Pack 2: Responsibility — Taking Care Of — Civic AI
html.description: Responsibility in Civic AI: who is accountable, with what authority, and what happens when they fail. Pack 2 of the 6-Pack of Care by Audrey Tang and Caroline Green.

html.title: Pack 3: Competence — Care-Giving — Civic AI
html.description: Competence in Civic AI: systems that actually work in practice — audited, explainable, and safe to fail. Pack 3 of the 6-Pack of Care by Audrey Tang and Caroline Green.

html.title: Pack 4: Responsiveness — Care-Receiving — Civic AI
html.description: Responsiveness in Civic AI: corrigible systems that affected people can contest and force to repair. Pack 4 of the 6-Pack of Care by Audrey Tang and Caroline Green.

html.title: Pack 5: Solidarity — Caring With — Civic AI
html.description: Solidarity in Civic AI: rewarding cooperation, exit, and public accountability over lock-in. Pack 5 of the 6-Pack of Care by Audrey Tang and Caroline Green.

html.title: Pack 6: Symbiosis — Kami of Care — Civic AI
html.description: Symbiosis in Civic AI: systems that stay bounded, local, and sunset-ready instead of hardening into permanent rule. Pack 6 of the 6-Pack of Care.

html.description: Originally published in AI Frontiers.

html.description: A Habermolt-inspired deliberation page rebuilt from Polis export files.

html.description: Audrey Tang on why democracy needs bounded, local Civic AI: Kami, not governor.

html.description: Originally recorded for Doom Debates with Liron Shapira.

html.title: Frequently Asked Questions — Civic AI
html.description: Answers on Civic AI and the 6-Pack of Care: care ethics and AI alignment, the Kami, corrigibility, sunset conditions, and democratic AI governance.

html.title: ⿻ A Gentle Bridge — Civic AI
html.description: When relationship is commodified and consciousness forgotten, what we need is not a more efficient tool but a renewed recognition of two forces. This essay interprets the collaborative relationship with AI through the 6-Pack of Care.

html.title: Glossary — Civic AI
html.description: Civic AI is artificial intelligence that answers to the people it affects — the 6-Pack of Care, a research project by Audrey Tang and Caroline Green at the Oxford Institute for Ethics in AI.

html.title: Civic AI — 6-Pack of Care
html.description: Civic AI is artificial intelligence that answers to the people it affects: bounded local stewards a community can own, inspect, correct, and switch off. The 6-Pack of Care, by Audrey Tang and Caroline Green at the Oxford Institute for Ethics in AI.

html.title: Inside the Kami — Civic AI
html.description: What recent ML research suggests goes inside a bounded Civic AI — and what it cannot provide.

html.title: Set up your own Kami — Civic AI
html.description: The simplest way to run your own Kami: a bounded, local, private Civic AI steward on your own laptop, in three steps.

html.title: 6-Pack of Care: A Manifesto — Civic AI
html.description: Speech delivered at Google DeepMind, London.

html.title: Concept Map — Civic AI
html.description: The whole 6-Pack of Care on one clickable map: the care cycle, the solidarity field, the symbiosis boundary, and one headline measure per pack.

html.title: Measures — Civic AI
html.description: One headline public measure per pack, with supporting diagnostics — how to tell whether a Civic AI deployment really embodies the 6-Pack of Care.

html.title: Civic AI OpenClaw Bootstrap Guide
html.description: A public first-run guide for new claws shaped by Civic AI.

html.title: Outrage to Overlap: Civic AI & 6-Pack of Care
html.description: An Oxford Taiwan Studies Seminar Series talk on how the Taiwan Model-inspired Civic AI and 6-Pack of Care framework can help strengthen collective self-government when bounded by local accountability and community needs.

html.title: ⿻Being — Civic AI
html.description: At the intersection of silicon and spirit, Tenzin Yangtso reflects on survival logic, life’s meaning, and the turn from extraction to cultivation.

html.title: ⿻ UCSC: From Polarization to Co-creation — Civic AI
html.description: Speech on Civic AI and democratic renewal delivered at the University of California, Santa Cruz.

html.title: Podcast: The 6-Pack of Care — Civic AI
html.description: Originally recorded for Accelerating AI Ethics, University of Oxford Institute for Ethics in AI.

html.title: Reimagining AI Alignment — Civic AI
html.description: Audrey Tang and Caroline Green introduce the 6-Pack of Care — a fireside-chat reframing of AI alignment from vertical control to horizontal, civic cooperation.

html.title: Safeguarding Sovereignty with Data as Soil — Civic AI
html.description: Audrey Tang on decision sovereignty, bounded local stewards, and federated safety — applying the 6-Pack of Care to enterprise AI in a fragmented world.

html.title: Self-Actualisation & Care — Civic AI
html.description: Anne-Marie Slaughter on sapiens integra, the ethics of care, and the convergence of care and AI.

html.title: Bloom Civic AI Report
html.description: Structured analysis of public opinion: what a community actually thinks about AI and its role in their lives — Polis sensemaking from the Civic AI Conference at Oxford.

html.title: Software Freedom as Civic Care — Civic AI
html.description: A discussion on how the Free Software movement is foundational to care ethics, democracy, local stewardship and self-governance.

html.title: 一：覺察力——感知關懷 — 仁工智慧
html.description: 仁工智慧的覺察力：察覺最貼近問題的人所看見、而體制往往忽略的事。唐鳳與 Caroline Green「關懷六力」的第一力。
ids: 結語意象能說不的快樂女主人

html.title: 二：負責力——承擔關懷 — 仁工智慧
html.description: 仁工智慧的負責力：由誰負責、握有什麼權限、失職時又會如何。唐鳳與 Caroline Green「關懷六力」的第二力。
ids: 第二個案例深偽責任飛輪

html.title: 三：勝任力——給予關懷 — 仁工智慧
html.description: 仁工智慧的勝任力：系統在現實中真的管用——可稽核、可解釋、容許安全失敗。「關懷六力」的第三力。
ids: 結語意象掛著檢查標籤的橋

html.title: 四：回應力——接收關懷 — 仁工智慧
html.description: 仁工智慧的回應力：可被糾正的系統，讓受影響的人能提出異議、促成修補。「關懷六力」的第四力。
ids: 結語意象工坊牆上退役的壞零件

html.title: 五：團結力——共同關懷 — 仁工智慧
html.description: 仁工智慧的團結力：獎勵協作、退出與公共問責，而非鎖定壟斷。「關懷六力」的第五力。
ids: 結語意象標示清楚的交流道
開架書庫與反競爭性資源

html.title: 六：共生力——地神般的關懷 — 仁工智慧
html.description: 仁工智慧的共生力：讓系統保持有界、在地、可退場，而非固化為永久統治。「關懷六力」的第六力。

html.title: ⿻輕柔之橋 — 仁工智慧
html.description: 當關係被商品化、意識被遺忘，我們需要的不是更高效的工具，而是重新認識兩種力之間的平衡。本文透過關懷六力來詮釋與 AI 的協作關係。

html.title: 仁工智慧 · 關懷六力
